machine_map_resolution.basis: Owner role assignment is authoritative over automatically-detected hostname/nproc evidence, per explicit owner instruction: 'Не использовать имена компьютеров как доказательство физической машины. Карта владельца имеет приоритет над автоматически обнаруженным hostname.'

hostname_evidence_preserved_not_acted_on.greenbear_machine: GREENBEAR, nproc=8 (not 6 -- recorded as evidence only, not used to override the owner's assignment)
hostname_evidence_preserved_not_acted_on.bolt_machine: DESKTOP-ODD5QN8, core count not independently confirmed by Bolt
hostname_evidence_preserved_not_acted_on.ember_machine: DESKTOP-ODD5QN8 (same hostname as Bolt reported), nproc=8

cowork_and_test_pool_handoff.test_collection_method: django.test.utils.get_runner(settings)().build_suite([label]) per app, summed; cross-checked against a single full-repo build_suite([]) call. Discovery only -- zero tests executed, zero database created for the count itself.
cowork_and_test_pool_handoff.shard_method_note: Initial split is deterministic by app-level test-collection count (no historical duration data exists yet). Refine to historical-duration once a full-suite run publishes per-shard durations, per AGENTS.md section 9.
cowork_and_test_pool_handoff.full_suite_run_note: Per instruction, no full 1429-test suite was run. One small connectivity proof was run instead (see below).

connectivity_proof.isolation: Django's own isolated test_culineire database, created and destroyed automatically. No production data read or written.
